steps.title: Link claim to description
steps.content: The first clause says the painting uses the entire visual light spectrum. The following clause describes rainbow-striped goggles, a rainbow-hued swimmer, and rainbow water, explaining how the painting does that.

steps.title: Reject poor clause links
steps.content: A fuses two independent clauses with no punctuation. C lacks a proper boundary and adds a weak "while" relation. D uses "while," which suggests timing or contrast rather than explanation. A colon correctly introduces the explanatory description. The answer is B.
